title: galium angustifolium subsp. angustifolium
intro: Galium angustifolium subsp. angustifolium, also known as narrow-leaved bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Galium angustifolium subsp. angustifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
